title: Functions, Scope, and Callable Contracts · Program Brief: Python Default Arguments
summary: Refactor the routing engine into testable calculations, validators, and reporting functions. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose defaults without shared mutable state and distinguish omitted values from explicit None when needed.

Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
